testcase.name: apiKeyAndBearerTokens_areScrubbedInJsonl

Skipping further processing. 14:27:59,670 |-INFO in ch.qos.logback.core.model.processor.DefaultProcessor@712dd0b0 - End of configuration. 14:27:59,670 |-INFO in ch.qos.logback.classic.joran.JoranConfigurator@6b3284 - Registering current configuration as safe fallback point
